title: Tritastic
description: A fabric mod adding fun trident variants
body:
![Tritastic Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f11be05d399b68a52df85198aeac5641a493ae0.png)

This mod adds five custom trident variants, all with unique riptide and hit effects, as well as a new way to obtain tridents.

### Custom Tridents:
| Trident | Effect | Smithing Addition |
|---|---|---|
|Hellfork|The netherite upgrade to the trident. Has inbuilt fire aspect and can riptide while on fire or in the nether|Netherite Upgrade|
|Soulfork|A withered relic of a trident. Applies wither on hit and can freely riptide anywhere at the cost of 2.5 hearts.|Wither Skull|
|Nightfork|A dark copy of a trident. Applies blindness on hit and can riptide at nighttime, although with less velocity than others.|Phantom Membrane|
|Echofang|The sculk got its hands on this trident and it feeds on the death of enemies via melee attacks, released in an explosion when you land a ranged hit. Riptide works anywhere, but only facing downards. Hitting the ground while in riptide creates a small explosion, damaging enemies, and cancelling fall damage.|Echo Shard|
|Enderfork|The corruption of the end has created this warped copy of a trident that can riptide through blocks, and spawns an endermite on hit.|Dragon's Breath|

Tridents can also be crafted from two prismarine shards and three guardian teeth. Elder guardians drop 1-3 of these teeth on death.

![Trident Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8124815a5f885e9a25167dd8d56cbbf2c776fc10.png)

Additionally, taking inspiration from [Fuzs' Better Tridents](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-tridents), tridents will, regardless of loyalty, return to the slot they were shot from, and will also return from the void if they have loyalty.
